report: 68-year-old female developed severe chest pain and shortness of breath 2 hours after taking Aspirin 500mg. She was admitted to hospital.
Patient reports mild headache after taking Paracetamol 500mg. Resolved after 2 hours without treatment.
32-year-old male experienced anaphylactic shock immediately after first dose of Amoxicillin. Required emergency epinephrine.
Elderly patient developed rash on arms after starting Metformin. Non-itchy, resolved spontaneously.
Patient died 3 days after initiating Warfarin therapy due to intracranial hemorrhage.
